title: [SVExtractTestCode] Instance inlining doesn't update inner symbols and clone sv.bind

features.name: sv.bind not cloned for multiple instances during inlining
features.description: Code should include sv.bind operations targeting multiple instances of the same module, where only one bind is emitted due to improper cloning during instance inlining
features.snippet:
bind Top Assert_assert a1 (.a(a), .clock(clock));
bind Top Assert_assert a2 (.a(b), .clock(clock));
